name: Bozeman Classic Pickleball Club
description: Bozeman Classic is Bozeman's indoor Pickleball Club with 4 full size (60' x 30') dedicated pickleball courts featuring outdoor grade court playing surface, permanent Putterman nets and posts, and a pro shop.  We are in Bozeman's hot NorthEast nieghborhood on E Peach St. between Wild Crumb and Mountains Walking Brewery.  We have 40 parking spots and are open daily from 5am-11pm for reservations.  A limited number of unlimited memberships are still available.
open_play_schedule: 1.5 Hour Reservation slots every day starting at 5:30AM
fees: Members only — Unlimited Memberships are for sale, limited to 395 total members.  Drop in guests can book courts up to 3 days in advance for $11/hr per player

name: Stillwater Youth Center
description: We've adapted an indoor racquetball court for pickleball, complete with tape lines, a portable net, and loaner paddles and balls ready for you to use. This smaller space will definitely test your accuracy and speed, making for some exciting and challenging games while sharpening your skills. All ages are welcome to come give it a try!
